base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of projectile_bomb_explosion — a effect_layer (explosion_vfx) from 1986 legend of zelda. small-dot. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: 5-frame bomb explosion — small-dot → expanding-fireball → full-burst → collapse → fade. Destroys breakable walls + damages enemies

nudges.delta: fade. Destroys breakable walls + damages enemies
